---
title: "Political Geography"
subtitle: "Spatial dimensions of political power, borders, states, and geopolitics."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include political-geography/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Political Geography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include political-geography/01-concept-nature-scope.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/02-state-nation-nationstate.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/03-boundaries-frontiers.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/04-geopolitical-theories.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/05-geography-of-federalism.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/06-regional-organisations.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/07-India-neighbour-relations.md >}}

---

## Part B: NEP-2020 Specific Topics

These topics are part of the NEP-2020 undergraduate programme only.

{{< include political-geography/08-resource-conflicts.md >}}

---

## Part C: UGC NET Specific Topics

These topics are part of the UGC NET syllabus only.

{{< include political-geography/09-electoral-geography.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/10-neopolitics-of-resources.md >}}

---


---

## Quick Reference

{{< include political-geography/12-quick-reference.md >}}

---
